actions.description: Log in using {{email}} and {{password}} from prerequisites

actions.instruction: Navigate to the extensions admin page
Find an inactive extension card (toggle switch is unchecked)
actions.description: Wait for a toggle switch element on extension cards

actions.instruction: Click the toggle switch on that extension card
actions.description: Click the toggle switch on the inactive extension card
Click the confirm button on the Activate Extension modal

actions.instruction: Observe the action tag changes to "Activating..." with a shimmer animation
actions.description: Capture the Activating shimmer animation state

actions.instruction: Wait for the success toast "Extension activated successfully"
actions.description: Wait for the activation success toast

actions.instruction: Verify the toggle switch is now checked (on)
actions.description: Verify the extension toggle is now checked (on)
